name: Instant Lead Response — Activix Webhook
description: n8n Workflow 1: Receives Activix CRM webhook on new lead creation, verifies HMAC signature, parses lead data, detects language (en-CA/fr-CA), queries inventory, generates personalized AI response, runs CASL compliance check, then sends SMS via Twilio + email via SendGrid, updates Activix lead status, and notifies the assigned rep via Slack. Compliance failures are logged and alerted without sending any message.

nodes.name: Activix Webhook
nodes.purpose: Receives POST from Activix CRM when a new lead is created. Types: email, phone, web_order, sms.

nodes.name: Webhook Verification
nodes.purpose: HMAC-SHA256 signature check using X-Activix-Webhook-Signature header. Returns 401 if invalid. Uses $env.ACTIVIX_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

nodes.name: Parse Lead Data
nodes.purpose: Extracts first_name, last_name, vehicles[], phones[], emails[], locale, source, type, advisor, opt-out fields, and sets implied consent from form submission.

nodes.name: Language Detection
nodes.purpose: Detects en-CA or fr-CA. Priority: 1) Activix locale field, 2) Quebec area codes (418, 438, 450, 514, 579, 581, 819, 873), 3) Quebec postal code prefixes (G, H, J), 4) default en-CA.

nodes.name: Inventory Query
nodes.purpose: Placeholder with sample inventory data. Matches lead vehicle interest to available stock, returns top 3 matches. TODO: Replace with HTTP Request to InventoryService API or Supabase.

nodes.name: Generate AI Response
nodes.purpose: Builds personalized bilingual message using template pattern: 'Hi {firstName}! Thanks for your interest in the {vehicle}. {inventoryDetail} Would you like to schedule a test drive? I can set something up with {repName}. - {dealershipName}'. TODO: Replace with Nexus AI Agent HTTP call.

nodes.name: Compliance Check
nodes.purpose: CASL compliance pre-flight: verifies consent exists, checks implied consent not expired (6-month window), checks opt-out fields, validates content has no forbidden financial language (monthly payments, interest rates, financing terms, credit scores, etc.).

nodes.name: Compliance Pass?
nodes.purpose: Routes based on compliance.pass boolean. True output -> send messages. False output -> log failure.

nodes.name: Send SMS via Twilio
nodes.purpose: Sends SMS via Twilio. Uses $env.TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER. Primary outbound channel.

nodes.name: Send Email
nodes.purpose: Sends email via SendGrid API v3. Secondary outbound channel. Configure HTTP Header Auth with Bearer token.
nodes.credentials_needed: SendGrid API Key (HTTP Header Auth: Authorization: Bearer sg_xxx)

nodes.name: Update Activix Lead
nodes.purpose: PUT /v2/leads/:id with result='attempted'. Retry on fail (3 attempts, 2s wait). Configure HTTP Header Auth with Bearer token.
nodes.credentials_needed: Activix API Key (HTTP Header Auth: Authorization: Bearer xxx)

nodes.name: Notify Rep via Slack
nodes.purpose: Posts lead summary to #leads channel: lead name, vehicle interest, source, language, phone, email, assigned advisor.
nodes.credentials_needed: Slack OAuth2 API (Bot Token with chat:write scope)

nodes.name: Log Compliance Failure
nodes.purpose: Logs COMPLIANCE_BLOCK event with lead details, failure reason, and alert payload for #compliance-alerts Slack channel. No outbound message is sent.

environment_variables_required: ACTIVIX_WEBHOOK_SECRET — HMAC secret for webhook signature verification
TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER — Twilio phone number for outbound SMS (e.g., +15145550100)
credentials_required: Twilio API — Account SID + Auth Token
SendGrid — HTTP Header Auth with Bearer token
Activix API — HTTP Header Auth with Bearer token
Slack — OAuth2 Bot Token with chat:write scope
flow_diagram: Activix Webhook -> Webhook Verification -> Parse Lead Data -> Language Detection -> Inventory Query -> Generate AI Response -> Compliance Check -> IF(pass) -> [Twilio SMS, SendGrid Email, Activix PUT, Slack Notify] | IF(fail) -> [Log Compliance Failure]
